title: Kitchen Devils S8603017 Control Starter Set, Stainless Steel, Black, 3 PCE & S8603000 Control Vegetable Knife, 10 cm, Multi-Colour
description: From the manufacturer Kitchen Devils S8603017 Control Starter Set, Stainless Steel, Black, 3 PCE Control has been developed by our parent company Fiskars, and won a prestigious red dot design award in 2006. A great choice for any cook or aspiring chef. The lightweight, ergonomically-shaped handles fit comfortably into the hand. They’re safe because they include a large finger stop and soft grip which provide superior comfort and help prevent hands from slipping. The ultra-sharp taper ground blades are made from high quality Japanese steel for long-lasting excellence.
